# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: projects/myprojectid/buckets/myfirstgcpbucket  # bucket for static content (e.g., images, stylesheets)
  type: storage.v1.bucket  
  properties: {}   
    
- name: 'instance'       # instance of the Compute Engine VM to use as a database server and load balancer backend service in GCE instances pool for SQL queries (default is p6 or n1)     
  type: compute.v1.instance  
  properties: {
    zone: "us-central1"     # choose your preferred region here, e.g., us-east4      
    machineType: 'n1-standard'        # instance configuration (default is p6 or n1)     
}
